predictions.speaker: A

predictions.speaker: B
predictions.utterance: I don't think I can make it anymore.

predictions.speaker: A

predictions.speaker: B
predictions.utterance: I know, I'm sorry. Something came up at work.

predictions.speaker: A
predictions.utterance: You always say that at the last minute.

predictions.speaker: B

predictions.speaker: B
